\documentclass{article}
\usepackage{amsmath}
\usepackage{amssymb}
\title{Equation Heavy Fixture}
\author{Strata Reader Project}
\begin{document}
\maketitle

\section{Introduction}
This document contains over 30 mathematical equations in display mode to verify formula detection.

\section{Mathematical Equations}

Equation 1: Euler's Identity
\begin{equation}
e^{i\pi} + 1 = 0
\end{equation}

Equation 2: Einstein's Field Equations
\begin{equation}
G_{\mu\nu} + \Lambda g_{\mu\nu} = \frac{8\pi G}{c^4} T_{\mu\nu}
\end{equation}

Equation 3: Schrödinger Equation
\begin{equation}
i\hbar \frac{\partial}{\partial t} \Psi(\mathbf{r}, t) = \hat{H} \Psi(\mathbf{r}, t)
\end{equation}

Equation 4: Maxwell's Equations - Gauss's Law
\begin{equation}
\nabla \cdot \mathbf{E} = \frac{\rho}{\varepsilon_0}
\end{equation}

Equation 5: Maxwell's Equations - Gauss's Law for Magnetism
\begin{equation}
\nabla \cdot \mathbf{B} = 0
\end{equation}

Equation 6: Maxwell's Equations - Faraday's Law
\begin{equation}
\nabla \times \mathbf{E} = -\frac{\partial \mathbf{B}}{\partial t}
\end{equation}

Equation 7: Maxwell's Equations - Ampere's Law
\begin{equation}
\nabla \times \mathbf{B} = \mu_0 \left( \mathbf{J} + \varepsilon_0 \frac{\partial \mathbf{E}}{\partial t} \right)
\end{equation}

Equation 8: Fourier Transform
\begin{equation}
\hat{f}(\xi) = \int_{-\infty}^{\infty} f(x) e^{-2\pi i x \xi} \, dx
\end{equation}

Equation 9: Inverse Fourier Transform
\begin{equation}
f(x) = \int_{-\infty}^{\infty} \hat{f}(\xi) e^{2\pi i x \xi} \, d\xi
\end{equation}

Equation 10: Gaussian Distribution
\begin{equation}
f(x) = \frac{1}{\sigma \sqrt{2\pi}} e^{-\frac{1}{2}\left(\frac{x-\mu}{\sigma}\right)^2}
\end{equation}

Equation 11: Navier-Stokes Equation
\begin{equation}
\rho \left( \frac{\partial \mathbf{u}}{\partial t} + \mathbf{u} \cdot \nabla \mathbf{u} \right) = -\nabla p + \mu \nabla^2 \mathbf{u} + \mathbf{f}
\end{equation}

Equation 12: Heat Equation
\begin{equation}
\frac{\partial u}{\partial t} - \alpha \nabla^2 u = 0
\end{equation}

Equation 13: Wave Equation
\begin{equation}
\frac{\partial^2 u}{\partial t^2} - c^2 \nabla^2 u = 0
\end{equation}

Equation 14: Black-Scholes Equation
\begin{equation}
\frac{\partial V}{\partial t} + \frac{1}{2} \sigma^2 S^2 \frac{\partial^2 V}{\partial S^2} + r S \frac{\partial V}{\partial S} - rV = 0
\end{equation}

Equation 15: Logistic Map
\begin{equation}
x_{n+1} = r x_n (1 - x_n)
\end{equation}

Equation 16: Shannon Entropy
\begin{equation}
H(X) = -\sum_{i=1}^n P(x_i) \log_2 P(x_i)
\end{equation}

Equation 17: Partition Function
\begin{equation}
Z = \sum_{s} e^{-\beta E_s}
\end{equation}

Equation 18: Boltzmann Distribution
\begin{equation}
P(s) = \frac{1}{Z} e^{-\beta E_s}
\end{equation}

Equation 19: Ideal Gas Law (Statistical Mechanics)
\begin{equation}
PV = N k_B T
\end{equation}

Equation 20: Planck's Law
\begin{equation}
B_\nu(T) = \frac{2h\nu^3}{c^2} \frac{1}{e^{\frac{h\nu}{k_B T}} - 1}
\end{equation}

Equation 21: De Broglie Relation
\begin{equation}
\lambda = \frac{h}{p}
\end{equation}

Equation 22: Dirac Equation
\begin{equation}
\left( i \gamma^\mu \partial_\mu - m \right) \psi = 0
\end{equation}

Equation 23: Bragg's Law
\begin{equation}
2d \sin\theta = n\lambda
\end{equation}

Equation 24: Friedmann Equation
\begin{equation}
\left(\frac{\dot{a}}{a}\right)^2 + \frac{kc^2}{a^2} = \frac{8\pi G \rho + \Lambda c^2}{3}
\end{equation}

Equation 25: Euler-Lagrange Equation
\begin{equation}
\frac{\partial L}{\partial q_i} - \frac{d}{dt}\left(\frac{\partial L}{\partial \dot{q}_i}\right) = 0
\end{equation}

Equation 26: Hamilton's Equations
\begin{equation}
\dot{q}_i = \frac{\partial H}{\partial p_i}, \quad \dot{p}_i = -\frac{\partial H}{\partial q_i}
\end{equation}

Equation 27: Central Limit Theorem (Characteristic Function)
\begin{equation}
\varphi_{\Sigma_n}(t) = \left[ \varphi_{X}\left( \frac{t}{\sqrt{n}} \right) \right]^n \to e^{-\frac{t^2}{2}}
\end{equation}

Equation 28: Laplace Transform
\begin{equation}
F(s) = \int_{0}^{\infty} e^{-st} f(t) \, dt
\end{equation}

Equation 29: Stirling's Approximation
\begin{equation}
\ln n! \approx n \ln n - n
\end{equation}

Equation 30: Riemann Zeta Function
\begin{equation}
\zeta(s) = \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n^s}
\end{equation}

Equation 31: Cauchy-Schwarz Inequality
\begin{equation}
|\langle \mathbf{u}, \mathbf{v} \rangle|^2 \le \langle \mathbf{u}, \mathbf{u} \rangle \langle \mathbf{v}, \mathbf{v} \rangle
\end{equation}

Equation 32: Taylor Series
\begin{equation}
f(x) = \sum_{n=0}^{\infty} \frac{f^{(n)}(a)}{n!} (x-a)^n
\end{equation}

\end{document}
